german_requirement.title: German Language Requirement is Not Dominant
german_requirement.subtitle: A significant majority of roles do not require German proficiency, highlighting accessibility challenges.

pm_type.title: Core PMs Dominate, Leaving Customer-Facing Roles Behind
pm_type.subtitle: A significant gap exists between Core and Customer-facing PM roles, indicating a concentration in product management types.

seniority.title: Senior Roles Dominate the Market
seniority.subtitle: With 59% of positions held by senior professionals, the market is clearly senior-heavy.

work_mode.title: On-site Work Dominates Despite Remote Options
work_mode.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating a need for clearer work mode expectations.

location.title: Berlin Dominates Job Market Concentration
location.subtitle: A significant majority of opportunities are concentrated in Berlin, limiting remote access.

ai.title: AI Expertise is Becoming Mainstream in Job Market
ai.subtitle: One-third of roles demand AI as a core responsibility, indicating high demand for AI skills.

industry.title: Industry Roles Are Equally Distributed Yet Unclassified
industry.subtitle: A significant portion of roles remains unclassified, indicating potential accessibility constraints.
